title: RAG Three-Step Process
description: An interactive Mermaid flowchart of the Retrieval-Augmented Generation pattern showing a user query flowing through retrieval, augmentation, and generation with supporting data stores.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.learningObjective: Trace a user query through the three sequential steps of the RAG pattern and identify the supporting data stores.
